response.justification: Strong senior engineer with 15+ years of hands-on development, open-source leadership (GISCollective), Linux/Unix fluency, and proven full-stack and architecture experience. However, the role demands German C1 minimum — the resume lists only basic German, which is a hard requirement gap. Formal team leadership and UML/requirements-management experience are also less explicit than the role expects.
strengths: Deep multi-stack engineering experience with strong open-source and Linux background
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates architecture ownership and long-term technical vision
Track record across consulting, product, and embedded contexts fits IT consulting scope
concerns: German listed as 'Basic' — falls short of the required C1 proficiency
Limited explicit evidence of formal team leadership or people management at executive level
No clear demonstration of UML proficiency or requirements-management methodology
